derived.causal_summary: Figma Desktop holds a project's real design systems, tokens, variables, and components, but a coding agent could only reach them through the Figma UI. Phase 001 ran a 5-iteration gpt-5.5-fast deep research into the silships figma-cli capabilities, the Figma MCP landscape, the skill architecture, and the install plus safety path. Phase 002 built the mcp-figma skill on the silships figma-cli (published to npm as figma-ds-cli; the npm package literally named figma-cli is an unrelated tool, never installed), authored the install and safety scripts, registered the skill graph and reciprocal sibling edges, and live-installed figma-ds-cli 1.2.0 from the repo build (npm publishes only a minimal 1.0.0) plus confirmed the Code Mode figma manual exposes get_figma_data and download_figma_images.
